comment.body:
Hi Alama is this still true ?

I repeat: I expect the trap to materialize during the week. Mostly in a form of ranging, but Trump’s tweet even poses the possibility for a double top. I don’t know... All I know is that below 6416.01 (and even with an avg 5 days price of this), the market is heading towards equilibrium from where negative returns will starts to get accumulated. But in order to avoid a black-swan, sentiment must be calmed.
I took shorts in the range of the blow-off top target and fakeout target during the last week, took decent profit, and now playing the trap and will add to shorts in small size at key upside levels (mostly spreads to mitigate the cost). 
Hedges (VIX) are still cheap. The range, I laid down in the weekly post is crucial, bcs out of the range upwards, the market bets on a squeeze-up towards 25s.

comment.body:
Intraday question. What hours are significant for you during trading? 
For example 

8:30 usually news
9:30 open market
10:00 possible reversal
15:00 power hour 

That is my subjective opinion how market moves from my experience. It is not like 100% something must happen during these hours but if something might happen, it can be around these hours
